# STRAT.052 ? Peak Performance (Kotler)

**Type:** PHILOSOPHY
**Category:** strategic_frameworks

**Status:** active

## Core Principles
Flow state cultivation; clear goals; immediate feedback; challenge-skill balance; complete focus; intrinsic motivation; altered perception

## Application
Engineer flow triggers; match challenge to skill; create feedback loops; eliminate distractions; find intrinsic motivation; group flow

## Key Values
- Flow engineering
- Optimal challenge
- Complete focus
- Intrinsic drive
- Peak states
